title: polycodium melanocarpum var. candicans
intro: Polycodium melanocarpum var. candicans, also known as Polypodium candicans, is a type of tropical fern that belongs to the Polypodiaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Polypodium candicans include treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as wound healing and reducing fever. Herbal preparations of Polypodium candicans can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and it has also been used in traditional folk medicine as a poultice or compress to treat various ailments.
